authors.name: Albert Einstein
authors.bio: Physicist whose work changed how we understand time, space, and imagination.

authors.name: Maya Angelou
authors.bio: Poet, memoirist, and speaker whose words carried courage and grace.

authors.name: Marcus Aurelius
authors.bio: Roman emperor whose private reflections became a public handbook for resilience.

authors.name: Frida Kahlo
authors.bio: Painter whose self-portraits turned pain, identity, and defiance into art.

authors.name: Nelson Mandela
authors.bio: Freedom fighter and statesman who transformed struggle into reconciliation.

quotes.content: Imagination is more important than knowledge.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.content: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.content: Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance, you must keep moving.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.content: Try not to become a person of success, but rather a person of value.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.content: A calm and modest life brings more happiness than the pursuit of success combined with constant restlessness.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.content: You may not control all the events that happen to you, but you can decide not to be reduced by them.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.content: If you are always trying to be normal, you will never know how amazing you can be.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.content: Nothing will work unless you do.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.content: We may encounter many defeats but we must not be defeated.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.content: When you know better, do better.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.content: You have power over your mind, not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.content: The happiness of your life depends upon the quality of your thoughts.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.content: Waste no more time arguing what a good man should be. Be one.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.content: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.content: Very little is needed to make a happy life; it is all within yourself, in your way of thinking.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.content: At the end of the day, we can endure much more than we think we can.
quotes.author: Frida Kahlo

quotes.content: I paint my own reality. The only thing I know is that I paint because I need to.
quotes.author: Frida Kahlo

quotes.content: Feet, what do I need you for when I have wings to fly?
quotes.author: Frida Kahlo

quotes.content: I never paint dreams or nightmares. I paint my own reality.
quotes.author: Frida Kahlo

quotes.content: Pain, pleasure, and death are no more than a process for existence.
quotes.author: Frida Kahlo

quotes.content: It always seems impossible until it is done.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.content: I learned that courage was not the absence of fear, but the triumph over it.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.content: A winner is a dreamer who never gives up.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.content: Do not judge me by my successes, judge me by how many times I fell down and got back up again.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.content: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela
